title: Metric overload in AI-generated dashboards
sourceLocation: Review of AI-generated analytics and operations dashboard code
summary: AI-generated dashboards display 10-15 metrics simultaneously in equal-weight card grids, overwhelming decision-makers rather than prioritizing by importance.
supportingClaims: When every metric has equal visual weight, users cannot identify which metric is most important for their current decision.
The 5-7 item cognitive load limit applies to simultaneous metric display.
